tasks.description: DataRole / RoleKind breaking migration — add CompositionRoot and PrimaryAdapter unit variants to DataRole (libs/domain/src/tddd/catalogue_v2/roles.rs). Remove Copy from DataRole (it now has 17 variants; Copy is already absent post-prior-track migration since DataRole is data-carrying; confirm Copy is absent and strum Display/FromStr cover the two new unit variants). Add CompositionRoot and PrimaryAdapter to the existing strum Display/FromStr and variant_name() match arms; keep value_object/entity/aggregate_root/domain_service/use_case constructor signatures and semantics unchanged. Update RoleKind (libs/domain/src/tddd/catalogue_linter.rs) to add CompositionRoot and PrimaryAdapter DataRole discriminants plus FunctionRole discriminants FreeFunction and UseCaseFunction; update from_data_role(), from_contract_role(), add from_function_role(), variant_name(), and internal role arrays. Update evaluate_catalogue_lint / helpers so RuleTarget can match FunctionEntry roles and KindLayerConstraint scans function entries as well as type / trait entries; this is required for the FreeFunction layer rule in T003 to be enforceable. Update usecase parse_role_kind() so lint config target_roles accepts CompositionRoot, PrimaryAdapter, FreeFunction, and UseCaseFunction. Update all callers that exhaustively match DataRole or RoleKind across all three layers: infrastructure signal evaluator (structural_eq.rs, type_signals_evaluator.rs, signal_tags.rs), contract-map renderer (contract_map_renderer_adapter/mod.rs), type-catalogue renderer (type_catalogue_render/entry_details.rs), codec (catalogue_document_codec: dto.rs, decode.rs, encode.rs — extend LintRuleKindDto / DataRoleDto wire names for the two new unit variants and role-target parsing/encoding for FunctionRole discriminants), and any usecase files with exhaustive role matches. Active-track catalogues are in domain-types.json (already updated by Phase 2 type-designer). Non-active-track catalogues are write-protected and must not be touched (CN-06). cargo make ci must pass after this task.

architecture-rules.json TDDD flip — set tddd.enabled: true for cli, cli_composition, and cli_driver layers. Add catalogue_file, catalogue_spec_signal, and schema_export blocks for each layer: cli uses crate name 'cli' with [[bin]] target (first [[bin]] TDDD instance in the workspace; verify rustdoc --document-private-items or equivalent bin-target flag is not required — bin targets are supported by rustdoc JSON nightly; note in the schema_export.targets value). Confirm sotp verify layers passes after the flip (layer definitions vs Cargo.toml workspace members). Full cargo make ci is deferred to T006 after the cli-layer catalogues and rustdoc baselines exist. Depends on T001.

Lint config — add KindLayerConstraint and NoRoleInMethodSignature rules for CompositionRoot and PrimaryAdapter to .harness/catalogue-lint/presets/ddd-strict.json. Rules to add: (1) CompositionRoot -> KindLayerConstraint { permitted_layers: ["cli_composition"] }; (2) PrimaryAdapter -> KindLayerConstraint { permitted_layers: ["cli_driver"] }; (3) PrimaryAdapter -> NoRoleInMethodSignature { forbidden_roles: ["Entity", "AggregateRoot", "ValueObject", "DomainService", "Specification", "Factory", "DomainEvent", "EventPolicy", "Repository", "SecondaryPort", "SpecificationPort", "UseCase", "Interactor", "Command", "Query", "ApplicationService"] }. Also update existing Dto and FreeFunction KindLayerConstraint rules to extend their permitted_layers with the cli-layer entries: Dto permits ["usecase", "infrastructure", "cli", "cli_driver"] (domain and cli_composition excluded); FreeFunction adds cli and cli_driver. ErrorType needs a new role-global rule if not already present: permitted_layers ["domain", "usecase", "infrastructure", "cli", "cli_composition"] (cli_driver excluded). Verify .harness/catalogue-lint/config.json (if it exists) is consistent. sotp track lint must not error on the newly drafted cli-layer catalogues after T005 is applied. Depends on T001, including FunctionRole / FreeFunction support in RoleKind and lint evaluation.

R1 matrix update — extend knowledge/conventions/type-designer-kind-selection.md R1 table to add cli, cli_composition, and cli_driver columns and CompositionRoot / PrimaryAdapter rows. Column entries for new rows: CompositionRoot: cli=forbidden, cli_composition=ONLY, cli_driver=forbidden (and forbidden in domain/usecase/infrastructure). PrimaryAdapter: cli=forbidden, cli_composition=forbidden, cli_driver=ONLY (and forbidden in domain/usecase/infrastructure). Existing rows: Dto — add cli=OK, cli_composition=forbidden, cli_driver=OK. ErrorType — add cli=OK, cli_composition=OK, cli_driver=forbidden. FreeFunction — add cli=OK, cli_composition=forbidden, cli_driver=OK. SecondaryAdapter — add cli=forbidden, cli_composition=forbidden, cli_driver=forbidden. All other roles not in the allowlist for cli-system layers are forbidden in all three new columns. Update the v5 roles note in the preamble to reflect 17 DataRole variants post this track. Depends on T001 (CompositionRoot/PrimaryAdapter must be defined before the matrix is authoritative).

Draft type catalogues for cli, cli_composition, and cli_driver layers. Create track/items/cli-layers-tddd-and-role-placement-lint-2026-06-24/cli-types.json, cli-composition-types.json, and cli-driver-types.json (schema_version: 5). cli catalogue: CliError as role ErrorType (enum, existing public type in apps/cli/src/error.rs); all public clap command / args / filter enums and structs under apps/cli/src/commands (for example TrackCommand, ReviewCommand, DryCommand, SignalCommand, VerifyCommand, PrCommand, GitCommand, TelemetryCommand, FileCommand, PlanCommand, and their public *Args / *Filter / *Name types) as role Dto; pub dispatch free functions (execute_*, run_cli* in main.rs if pub — note fn main() is private, not catalogued; track_command_label / hook_command_hook_name / verify_command_gate_name are private helpers, not catalogued). cli_composition catalogue: CompositionError as role ErrorType (enum, apps/cli-composition/src/error.rs); per-context composition root structs (DemoCompositionRoot, ArchCompositionRoot, etc.) as role CompositionRoot (each is a wiring struct). Do not declare Dto or FreeFunction entries in cli_composition; if cli_composition::CommandOutcome, tee_stderr_to_file, or build_codex_read_only_invocation are public at implementation time, make them private helpers, remove/move them to cli_driver, or move behavior behind CompositionRoot build methods before catalogue linting so the catalogue stays within the allowlist. cli_driver catalogue: CommandOutcome (apps/cli-driver/src/render.rs) as role Dto (struct — it is a plain data carrier, not a primary-adapter driver itself); per-family driver structs (DemoDriver, TelemetryDriver, etc.) as role PrimaryAdapter (each holds an injected use case, exposes handle()); public render_* helpers in apps/cli-driver/src/render.rs as role FreeFunction (stateless output formatting functions). Input types (DemoInput, TelemetryInput, etc.) as role Dto. Use action: add for types newly declared in this track; use action: reference for types that already exist in the baseline and are not changed. Depends on T002 and T003 (architecture-rules.json must have tddd.enabled: true before catalogues are authored; lint rules must be in place for sotp track lint to validate).

Baseline capture and CI gate. Capture rustdoc JSON baselines for cli, cli_composition, and cli_driver layers: run bin/sotp track baseline-capture (or the equivalent cargo make workflow) for each of the three layers now that tddd.enabled is true in architecture-rules.json. Handle the [[bin]] target edge case for cli: verify that the sotp signal calc-impl-catalog command can resolve the cli bin crate's rustdoc output and produce a signal. Fix any baseline-capture issues specific to [[bin]] targets. Run cargo make ci (fmt-check + clippy + nextest + deny + check-layers + verify-*) and fix all remaining issues. sotp track lint must pass for all six active catalogues (domain, usecase, infrastructure, cli, cli_composition, cli_driver); the infrastructure catalogue is expected to remain empty for this track and must lint cleanly. Run sotp verify plan-artifact-refs as the final gate. Depends on T005.

sections.title: DataRole breaking migration — CompositionRoot and PrimaryAdapter variants
description: T001 is the central CN-06 atomic change for this track. Adding CompositionRoot and PrimaryAdapter as unit variants to DataRole triggers exhaustive match requirements across all layers (domain / infrastructure / usecase). The same task extends RoleKind to cover FunctionRole discriminants and teaches catalogue lint evaluation to apply KindLayerConstraint to FunctionEntry items, so the FreeFunction layer rule in T003 is enforceable. Because splitting produces non-CI-passing intermediate states, the entire breaking migration — roles.rs variant additions, RoleKind discriminant additions, strum Display/FromStr, codec DTO wire names, signal evaluator/renderer/all role== comparisons — is bundled into one task.

The active-track catalogues (domain-types.json drafted in Phase 2) already declare both new variants as action: modify entries. Non-active-track catalogues are write-protected and must not be touched (CN-06 scope limitation).
After T001, cargo make ci must pass as a standalone CI gate.

sections.title: TDDD enablement — architecture-rules.json flip for the three cli layers
description: T002 flips tddd.enabled from false to true for cli, cli_composition, and cli_driver in architecture-rules.json. Each layer gets a catalogue_file, catalogue_spec_signal, and schema_export block.

The cli layer is the first [[bin]] crate to be TDDD-enabled in the workspace. The schema_export targets field uses the crate name 'cli', which is the [[bin]] target. Implementers must verify that the rustdoc JSON generation path works for bin targets (nightly rustdoc --output-format json applied to a [[bin]] target) and document any required flags.

sotp verify layers must pass after the flip (real crate names vs architecture-rules.json entries are verified by the existing check-layers gate). Full cargo make ci is deferred to T006 after the cli-layer catalogues and rustdoc baselines exist.
Depends on T001 (DataRole codec must handle the new variants before any TDDD signal evaluation is attempted on the new layers).

sections.title: Lint config expansion — KindLayerConstraint rules for new roles and cli layers
description: T003 updates .harness/catalogue-lint/presets/ddd-strict.json to add the role-placement enforcement rules mandated by ADR 1420 D2/D3.

New rules: CompositionRoot → KindLayerConstraint (cli_composition only); PrimaryAdapter → KindLayerConstraint (cli_driver only); PrimaryAdapter → NoRoleInMethodSignature (forbid domain/usecase-layer roles in method signatures).

Extended rules: the role-global Dto constraint preserves usecase and infrastructure while adding cli and cli_driver; FreeFunction gains cli and cli_driver in its permitted layers. A new role-global ErrorType KindLayerConstraint rule permits domain, usecase, infrastructure, cli, and cli_composition while excluding cli_driver.

After T003, sotp track lint run against the cli-layer catalogues (drafted in T005) must produce zero violations for compliant entries and must report violations for intentionally misconfigured entries (AC-07 / AC-08 enforcement confirmation).
Depends on T001 (CompositionRoot, PrimaryAdapter, and FreeFunction must be defined in RoleKind and lint evaluation before rules referencing them are meaningful).

sections.title: Convention doc update — R1 matrix columns and rows for cli layers
description: T004 extends the type-designer-kind-selection.md R1 layer-kind compatibility table to include the three new TDDD columns (cli / cli_composition / cli_driver) and two new role rows (CompositionRoot / PrimaryAdapter).

The matrix is a copy of the ADR 1420 D3 allowlist decisions — not the decision venue. All forbidden combinations and ONLY-qualified placements are filled in for all existing and new roles across the three new columns.
The v5 roles note in the convention preamble is updated to reflect 17 DataRole variants (15 + CompositionRoot + PrimaryAdapter).
Depends on T001 (DataRole must define the variants before the matrix entry can be authoritative).

sections.title: Type catalogue authoring for cli, cli_composition, and cli_driver
description: T005 drafts three layer-level type catalogues (cli-types.json, cli-composition-types.json, cli-driver-types.json) at schema_version 5.

cli catalogue: CliError (role: ErrorType), all public clap command / args / filter enums and structs under apps/cli/src/commands as Dto, and any public free functions in apps/cli. fn main() is private and not catalogued. The dispatch helpers (track_command_label, etc.) are private and not catalogued.

cli_composition catalogue: CompositionError (role: ErrorType), all per-context *CompositionRoot structs (role: CompositionRoot — these are the wiring structs that build and inject drivers). No Dto or FreeFunction entries are declared for cli_composition; if cli_composition::CommandOutcome, tee_stderr_to_file, or build_codex_read_only_invocation are public at implementation time, make them private helpers, remove/move them to cli_driver, or move behavior behind CompositionRoot build methods before catalogue linting.

cli_driver catalogue: CommandOutcome (role: Dto — a plain data carrier struct), per-family *Driver structs (role: PrimaryAdapter), public render_* helpers (role: FreeFunction), *Input enums (role: Dto).
Types that exist in the baseline and are not modified by this track use action: reference. Types newly declared in this track use action: add.
Depends on T002 (architecture-rules.json must have tddd.enabled: true) and T003 (lint rules must be in place for the sotp track lint validation in T006).

sections.title: Baseline capture for new TDDD layers and final CI gate
description: T006 captures the rustdoc JSON baselines for cli, cli_composition, and cli_driver (via bin/sotp track baseline-capture or the cargo make equivalent). The [[bin]] target edge case for the cli layer is the primary implementation risk: verify that cargo +nightly rustdoc --output-format json on a [[bin]] target produces usable rustdoc JSON and that bin/sotp signal calc-impl-catalog can consume it (AC-09).
After successful baseline captures, runs cargo make ci (fmt-check + clippy + nextest + deny + check-layers + verify-*) and fixes all remaining issues.

sotp track lint is run against all six active catalogues (domain, usecase, infrastructure, cli, cli_composition, cli_driver); the infrastructure catalogue is expected to remain empty for this track and must lint cleanly, and the full lint run must produce zero violations (AC-07). sotp track lint with a deliberately misconfigured entry (CompositionRoot in cli_driver, PrimaryAdapter in cli_composition) must produce violations (AC-08 enforcement confirmation).
bin/sotp verify plan-artifact-refs is run as the final Phase 3 gate. AC-10 (cargo make ci all-green) is the final acceptance criterion for this section.
Depends on T005 (catalogues must be authored before baselines can be captured and lint can be run).
